g.text: UEORMS Navigation Chart - Part 1: Access and Navigation Foundations
HR roles -> HR, attendance, leave, payroll
Inventory roles -> inventory, warehouse, receipts, dispatch
Sales roles -> CRM, sales orders, quotations, analytics
Purchase roles -> vendors, orders, requisitions, analytics
PM/Manager roles -> projects, tasks, approvals, reports
ADMIN -> role-management, roles, company, system-options, audit
